actionTakingUsers.sub: of users acted on a result

kptSegmentation.label: Knowledge Seekers
kptSegmentation.sub: of active users primarily browsing lessons, collections, country context

kptSegmentation.label: Expertise Connectors
kptSegmentation.sub: of active users primarily using Sherlock and expert profiles

kptSegmentation.label: Task Executors
kptSegmentation.sub: of active users primarily using TOR Genie, Grumpy Reviewer, Translate
kptSegmentation.bottom: ~1,145 users · TOR Genie dominant · 1,242 unique TOR Genie visitors

persona.title: Task Team Leader (TTL)
persona.exampleQuery: Draft a TOR for an urban resilience project in Vietnam with a $50M IDA envelope
persona.insight: High-volume, high-intensity user. Runs multi-step sessions spanning TOR drafting, economic background, and compliance checks in a single sitting. Highest action rate on the platform.

persona.title: Senior Macro Economist
persona.exampleQuery: Compare inflation trajectories in Egypt, Morocco, and Tunisia post-2022 with IMF projections
persona.insight: Research-driven power user who chains multiple analytical prompts per session. Frequently cites and exports findings directly to policy notes and briefs.

persona.title: Investment Officer (IFC)
persona.exampleQuery: What are lessons from IFC fintech investments in Sub-Saharan Africa over the past 5 years?
persona.insight: Rapidly increasing usage as K360 proves value for deal diligence and lessons. Projected to enter the Power User quadrant in the next cycle.

persona.title: Climate & Infrastructure Specialist
persona.exampleQuery: Summarise best practices for coal transition financing in Central Asia
persona.insight: Usage growing in line with the expanded climate mandate. Multi-agent synthesis is the primary draw — sessions increasingly span multiple knowledge domains.

persona.title: Research Analyst
persona.exampleQuery: Find peer-reviewed sources on the impact of social protection on labour supply in LMICs
persona.insight: Low-frequency but very high-intensity sessions. Runs 10–20 prompts per sitting focused on evidence synthesis, typically for WDR or flagship report chapters.

persona.title: Portfolio Officer
persona.exampleQuery: Which active projects in AFR have overdue ISRs and what are the common risk themes?
persona.insight: Focused sessions oriented around specific portfolio tasks. Action rate is very high — most queries end with a document export or decision note.

persona.title: Country Economist
persona.exampleQuery: Pull the latest poverty headcount data for Ethiopia and compare with SSA regional averages
persona.insight: Highest prompt-per-session ratio on the platform. Runs marathon research sessions anchored to a Country Economic Memorandum or Systematic Country Diagnostic deliverable.

persona.title: Practice Manager
persona.exampleQuery: Synthesise findings across HD and education lending in South Asia for the past 3 years
persona.insight: Uses K360 primarily for synthesis tasks ahead of management reviews. Sessions are purposeful and time-boxed; rarely re-runs a query.

persona.title: Operations Officer
persona.exampleQuery: What are the procurement requirements for a community-driven development project under OP 4.12?
persona.insight: Recent convert from one-time visitor. Started using K360 for fiduciary queries and is now exploring TOR drafting. Engagement growing steadily — watch for transition into the Focused segment.

persona.title: Young Professional (YP) / Junior Economist
persona.exampleQuery: Summarise IMF Article IV findings for Indonesia, Philippines, and Vietnam in 2024
persona.insight: Building K360 habits through repeated use for research briefs. Strong candidate for the Focused User segment — targeted prompts from their unit would accelerate progression.

persona.title: Administrative Assistant
persona.exampleQuery: Where can I find the standard consulting contract template?
persona.insight: Single-session user who arrived via a team referral for a specific document lookup. K360 is not aligned to core daily workflows for this role.

persona.title: HR Officer
persona.exampleQuery: What is the parental leave policy for locally hired staff?
persona.insight: Used K360 once for an HR policy question that could have been resolved via the staff portal. Platform not well-suited to this persona's core workflows.

persona.title: Procurement Officer
persona.exampleQuery: Summarise OP/BP 4.00 procurement requirements for consulting firms
persona.insight: High prompt count for a single session — engaged once, deeply, but did not return. Possible value fit for policy lookups if re-engaged with targeted content.

persona.title: Finance Officer
persona.exampleQuery: What are the allowable expenses for mission travel under the Admin Manual?
persona.insight: One-time user for an administrative finance query. K360's value proposition for routine finance questions remains unclear without a dedicated finance knowledge collection.

persona.title: Communications Officer
persona.exampleQuery: Find key results from WB infrastructure projects in Indonesia for a press release
persona.insight: Tried K360 for content research with moderate prompt depth. Did not return — outputs likely required significant editing to meet communications standards.

persona.title: IT Support Specialist
persona.exampleQuery: What is the data classification policy for sharing operational documents externally?
persona.insight: Single exploratory visit for an internal IT policy query. K360 is not the right fit for IT-specific or infrastructure documentation needs.

persona.title: Short-Term Consultant (STC)
persona.exampleQuery: What are lessons from public financial management reforms in Latin America?
persona.insight: Engaged deeply for a specific assignment. High prompt depth for a one-time user — likely found value but engagement ended with the contract.

persona.title: Junior Professional Officer (JPO)
persona.exampleQuery: Give me an overview of WB agricultural projects in West Africa
persona.insight: Initial exploration visit. Promising re-engagement candidate — targeted onboarding with sector-specific prompts would likely convert this persona to a Focused User.

persona.title: Country Manager
persona.exampleQuery: What is the current status of our active portfolio in Ghana?
persona.insight: Logs in frequently but delegates deep research to team members. Sessions are brief check-ins rather than substantive queries — high frequency, low depth.

persona.title: Regional Coordinator
persona.exampleQuery: List active projects across SAR with flagged implementation issues
persona.insight: High login frequency, low prompt depth. Uses K360 as a quick reference tool rather than an analytical platform. A structured dashboard view would serve this persona better.

persona.title: Operations Analyst
persona.exampleQuery: What reporting is required for a $200M DPL in the MNA region?
persona.insight: Frequent but shallow engagement driven by routine operational queries. Consider whether structured templates would serve this workflow better than open-ended AI queries.

persona.title: Sector Unit Assistant
persona.exampleQuery: Find the latest energy sector strategy document for Central Asia
persona.insight: Very high session count but consistently shallow queries dominated by administrative tasks. Evaluate whether K360 is the appropriate tool for this workflow.
